name: Magic 2014

draft.notes: 10 commons, 3 uncommons, 1 rare, 1 basic land, 1 ad card. If a foil appears it comes after the rare and displaces a common.

sourceNotes: Core set. 15-card booster packs plus an additional ad card (36/box). Foil 1:67 cards. Printed in USA and Belgium. The ad/marketing card carries tokens/tips/emblems on its front face (not a collectible token slot).
